text: ⚡️ 🇩🇿 GRAPHIC: A Suicide attack occurred on Mohamed Boudiaf street in the city of Blida, approximately 48 kilometres south‑west of Algiers. Security reinforcements have been deployed. Geolocation: (For Nerds) 36.4830480, 2.8259680 @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇩🇿 图形：阿尔及利亚布利达市穆罕默德·布迪亚夫街发生自杀式袭击，该地位于阿尔及尔西南约48公里处。安全增援部队已部署。地理定位：（极客专用）36.4830480, 2.8259680 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇬🇧 🇮🇷 The UKMTO has announced that maritime access restrictions affecting Iranian ports and coastal areas came into force at 1400 UTC on 13 April 2026. The measures apply to vessels of all flags engaging with Iranian ports, oil terminals, and coastal facilities across the Arabian Gulf, Gulf of Oman, and the Arabian Sea east of the Strait of Hormuz. The restrictions cover the entire Iranian coastline, including key ports and energy infrastructure, while neutral vessels currently in Iranian ports have been granted a limited grace period to depart. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇬🇧 🇮🇷 英国海上贸易行动办公室（UKMTO）宣布，影响伊朗港口和沿海地区的海上准入限制已于2026年4月13日1400 UTC生效。这些措施适用于所有与阿拉伯湾、阿曼湾以及霍尔木兹海峡以东阿拉伯海的伊朗港口、石油码头和沿海设施进行往来的悬挂各国旗帜的船只。限制范围覆盖整个伊朗海岸线，包括主要港口和能源基础设施，目前在伊朗港口的外国中立船只已获得有限的离港宽限期。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 The Israeli military announced that it has confirmed that more than 250 Hezbollah members and commanders were killed in the largest strike of Operation Roaring Lion on 8 April across Beirut, the Bekaa and southern Lebanon. Those killed included Hassan Mustafa Nasser (head of logistics support headquarters), Ali Qassem, Abu Ali Abbas and Ali Hijazi (senior intelligence commanders), and Abu Muhammad Habib (deputy commander of Hezbollah’s missile unit). Lebanon’s health ministry reported 357 total dead in that strike wave, meaning at least 70% of those killed were Hezbollah members, using the IDF's claimed assessment. The total number of Hezbollah fighters allegedly eliminated in the current campaign has now exceeded 1,500. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 以色列军方宣布，已确认在4月8日“咆哮狮子”行动（Operation Roaring Lion）对贝鲁特、贝卡谷地和黎巴嫩南部进行的最大规模打击中，超过250名真主党成员和指挥官被击毙。死者包括哈桑·穆斯塔法·纳赛尔（后勤支援总部负责人）、阿里·卡西姆、阿布·阿里·阿巴斯和阿里·希贾齐（高级情报指挥官），以及阿布·穆罕默德·哈比卜（真主党导弹部队副指挥官）。黎巴嫩卫生部报告称，该轮打击共造成357人死亡，这意味着根据以色列国防军的评估，至少70%的死者是真主党成员。在当前的军事行动中，据称被消灭的真主党武装人员总数现已超过1500人。 @wfwitness

text: 🔄 Forwarded from China and Geopolitics with Danny Haiphong: *** Join Danny Haiphong LIVE today April 13th 11am eastern 5pm CET w/ Mohammad Marandi*** Prof. Marandi details his experience in Islamabad for the negotiations between he US and Iran, and what the blockade declared by Trump on Iran's ports means for the country and the world. Don't miss the latest update on the next phase of the war as the war restarts amid failed peace talks. Watch here: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=3_YeUduTclU
text_zh: 🔄 转发自 China and Geopolitics with Danny Haiphong：*** 今天4月13日东部时间上午11点/欧洲中部时间下午5点，加入 Danny Haiphong 的直播，嘉宾为 Mohammad Marandi *** Marandi 教授详细介绍了他在伊斯兰堡参与美伊谈判的经历，以及特朗普宣布对伊朗港口实施封锁对该国和世界意味着什么。在和平谈判失败、战争重启之际，千万不要错过关于战争下一阶段的最新进展。点击此处观看：https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=3_YeUduTclU

text: Péter Magyar: If Vladimir Putin calls me, I will pick up the phone. I do not think that will happen. I will not call him myself, but if we do talk, I can tell him to please stop the killing now, after four years, and end that war, which doesn't make any sense from their point of view either, because tens of thousands of Russians have lost their lives. I don't think he is going to end the war on my advice. I very much hope that he will be forced to do so regardless.
text_zh: 彼得·马扎尔（Péter Magyar）：如果弗拉基米尔·普京给我打电话，我会接听。我不认为这会发生。我自己不会给他打电话，但如果我们交谈，我会告诉他，请在四年后立即停止杀戮，结束那场从他们的角度来看也毫无意义的战争，因为成千上万的俄罗斯人已经失去了生命。我不认为他会听从我的建议结束战争。我非常希望他无论如何都能被迫这样做。

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Beirut Disaster Management Center: The damaged building targeted by the IDF on Wednesday will be demolished following a strike in Tallet El Khayat, Verdun due to the danger it poses to public safety. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 贝鲁特灾难管理中心：周三遭以色列国防军袭击的塔莱特·埃尔·哈亚特（Tallet El Khayat）凡尔登（Verdun）地区受损建筑物，因对公共安全构成威胁，将在袭击后被拆除。 @wfwitness

text: Open Source Intel Egypt, Pakistan, and Turkey are mediating a push for new U.S.-Iran talks before the April 21 ceasefire expires. The parties are reportedly "not in a complete deadlock, the door isn't closed yet." - Axios. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：埃及、巴基斯坦和土耳其正在斡旋，推动在4月21日停火协议到期前进行新的美伊会谈。据报道，各方“并未陷入完全僵局，大门尚未关闭”。- Axios 推文

text: OSINTdefender Here's the current view of tanker (red) and container (green) traffic in the Persian Gulf and Gulf of Oman. President Donald J. Trump's naval blockade of Iranian ports begins in less than 30 minutes. https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2043683585178083562/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender：这是目前波斯湾和阿曼湾油轮（红色）和集装箱船（绿色）交通的实时视图。唐纳德·J·特朗普总统对伊朗港口的海军封锁将在不到30分钟后开始。https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2043683585178083562/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel A senior US official told Al-Jazeera: We are ready to impose a naval blockade on Iran, and we have enough forces and equipment to carry it out. We will implement this, regardless of the duration set by President Trump. We will not discuss the possibility of the US fleet passing through the Strait of Hormuz to secure our operations, nor will we, at this time, discuss the rules of engagement in the event of a violation of the naval blockade of Iran. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：一位美国高级官员告诉半岛电视台：我们已准备好对伊朗实施海军封锁，我们有足够的兵力和装备来执行。无论特朗普总统设定的期限如何，我们都将执行。我们目前不会讨论美国舰队通过霍尔木兹海峡以确保我们行动的可能性，也不会在此时讨论违反伊朗海军封锁时的交战规则。推文

text: Open Source Intel Russia's Rosatom says it has begun the final wave of evacuation from Iran's Bushehr nuclear power plant. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：俄罗斯国家原子能公司（Rosatom）表示，已开始从伊朗布什尔核电站进行最后一波撤离。推文

text: WarTranslated As usual, not even a day has passed, and the Russians are already in a state of hysteria following Orban's election defeat. https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2043682557733097677/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated：像往常一样，甚至还没过一天，俄罗斯人就已经在欧尔班选举失败后陷入了歇斯底里。https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2043682557733097677/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel China: “The Strait of Hormuz was already open before the war. You are the ones who created the war out of nothing and closed the strait to the rest of the world.” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043682546324525298/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：中国：“霍尔木兹海峡在战争前就已经开放。是你们凭空制造了战争，并对世界其他地区关闭了海峡。” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043682546324525298/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel NEW 🔴 The wife of Spain’s Prime Minister Pedro Sánchez has been formally charged with influence peddling and corruption. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043682489399443718/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：最新消息 🔴 西班牙首相佩德罗·桑切斯的妻子已被正式指控犯有以权谋私和腐败罪。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043682489399443718/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Pakistan's Defense Minister: U.S.-Iran negotiations expected to resume soon. "Only positive statements came after the latest round." https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043681864943087898/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：巴基斯坦国防部长：美伊谈判预计很快恢复。“最新一轮会谈后，各方仅发表了积极的声明。” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043681864943087898/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Iran's Acting Defense Minister Brig. Gen. Seyyed Majid Ibn Reza: "We are ready for any scenario. The armed forces are on maximum combat alert. Any act of aggression or provocation by the enemy will be met with a harsh and decisive response." https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043681365607014527/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：伊朗代理国防部长赛义德·马吉德·伊本·礼萨准将：“我们已为任何情况做好准备。武装部队处于最高战备状态。敌人采取的任何侵略或挑衅行为都将遭到严厉而果断的回应。” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043681365607014527/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Iran's Khatam Al-Anbiya military command: Security in the Persian Gulf and Sea of Oman "is either for all or none." - Iranian state media https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043681128033276379/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：伊朗哈塔姆·安比亚（Khatam Al-Anbiya）军事指挥部：波斯湾和阿曼海的安全“要么属于所有人，要么属于无人”。- 伊朗国家媒体 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043681128033276379/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel IDF Spokesperson Nadav Shoshani: "While Hezbollah held its fire during that period, Jihad says they never disarmed. He says they pointed Lebanese soldiers to disused, defunct or damaged old stockpiles they no longer needed, and let them confiscate those. But Hezbollah's real arsenal was largely untouched, he says. 'They didn't confiscate anything! We gave them empty boxes, or a few old items to go blow up,' he explains." tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：以色列国防军发言人纳达夫·肖沙尼（Nadav Shoshani）：“虽然真主党在那段时间停止了射击，但‘圣战’（Jihad）称他们从未解除武装。他说，他们向黎巴嫩士兵指出了他们不再需要的废弃、失效或损坏的旧库存，并让他们没收了这些东西。但他表示，真主党真正的武器库基本未受影响。‘他们什么也没没收！我们给了他们空箱子，或者一些旧物品去炸掉，’他解释道。” 推文

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇮🇱 Benjamin Netanyahu: 📌 “The ceasefire with Iran is like a coin — it can flip very quickly.” 📌 “Israel is working to establish a deeper security zone in Lebanon.” 📌 “Israel is at the peak of its power. We have an alliance with the world’s strongest country, and together we can confront the most serious threats.” 📌 “After Iran broke the rules, Trump decided to impose a blockade, a naval siege — and we fully support this firm stance.” 🟦 According to Al Hadath, in response to the potential blockade of the Strait of Hormuz, Iran may carry out missile strikes today against U.S. military targets and Israel. See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 tweet
text_zh: Visioner 转发 @NSTRIKE1231：🇮🇱 本雅明·内塔尼亚胡：📌 “与伊朗的停火就像一枚硬币——它可能会非常快地翻转。” 📌 “以色列正在努力在黎巴嫩建立一个更深的安全区。” 📌 “以色列正处于力量的巅峰。我们与世界上最强大的国家结盟，我们可以共同面对最严重的威胁。” 📌 “在伊朗破坏规则后，特朗普决定实施封锁，即海军围困——我们完全支持这一坚定立场。” 🟦 据 Al Hadath 报道，为应对霍尔木兹海峡可能被封锁，伊朗今天可能对美国军事目标和以色列发动导弹袭击。与我们一起查看最新更新：@NSTRIKE1231 推文

text: Faytuks News Thank you Barcelona for a fantastic vacation. Heading home now so I'll be back to 20+ posts a day 😆 I am currently on vacation in Barcelona so there will be less updates during the next few days. Take care! ☀️ - Faytuks News tweet
text_zh: Faytuks News：感谢巴塞罗那，这是一次美妙的假期。现在正准备回家，所以我将恢复每天发布20多条推文 😆 我目前正在巴塞罗那度假，所以未来几天更新会减少。保重！☀️ - Faytuks News 推文

text: Open Source Intel Iran is rushing to restore bridges and railways damaged in the recent strikes. Mehr News Agency claims they have already been fully rebuilt. @kaisos1987 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043678872562987210/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：伊朗正急于修复在最近袭击中受损的桥梁和铁路。梅尔通讯社（Mehr News Agency）声称它们已经完全重建。@kaisos1987 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043678872562987210/photo/1 推文

text: OSINTdefender C-17A "Globemaster" and KC-135 "Stratotanker" activity over Europe and the Middle East over the last 24 hours via http://FlightRadar24.com . https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2043678409834791066/video/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender：过去24小时内欧洲和中东上空的 C-17A “环球霸王”和 KC-135 “同温层加油机”活动，数据来自 http://FlightRadar24.com 。https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2043678409834791066/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel USS Nimitz and USS Gridley conducted formation maneuvers alongside two Ecuadorian Navy corvettes in the Pacific Ocean as part of Southern Seas 2026, a deployment aimed at strengthening maritime partnerships in the region. - U.S. Navy tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：尼米兹号（USS Nimitz）和格里德利号（USS Gridley）驱逐舰在太平洋与两艘厄瓜多尔海军轻型护卫舰进行了编队演习，这是“2026南方海域”（Southern Seas 2026）行动的一部分，旨在加强该地区的海上伙伴关系。- 美国海军 推文

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : ❗️ ❗️ 🇺🇸 A significant surge in U.S. military airlift activity toward the Middle East has been observed in recent days and hours, with a steady flow of heavy transport aircraft — including Boeing C-17 Globemaster III and C-5 Galaxy — heading to American and Israeli bases in the region. 🔹 Reports indicate a large buildup of munitions, particularly aerial bombs and air defense missiles, at military bases. See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 tweet
text_zh: Visioner 转发 @NSTRIKE1231：❗️ ❗️ 🇺🇸 近日和数小时内，美国向中东的军事空运活动显著激增，重型运输机——包括波音 C-17 环球霸王 III 和 C-5 银河——源源不断地飞往该地区的美国和以色列基地。🔹 报告显示，军事基地内弹药（特别是航空炸弹和防空导弹）大量积压。与我们一起查看最新更新：@NSTRIKE1231 推文

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 Israel’s Supreme Court has barred public entry to the courtroom during the hearing on the potential dismissal of Minister Itamar Ben-Gvir, citing concerns over possible disruptions and outbursts. It was announced that the proceedings will be broadcast live. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 以色列最高法院已禁止公众在审理罢免伊塔马·本-格维尔（Itamar Ben-Gvir）部长潜在案件的听证会期间进入法庭，理由是担心可能出现干扰和爆发冲突。宣布审理过程将进行现场直播。 @wfwitness

text: Péter Magyar on Ukraine: We do not support Ukraine's accelerated accession to the EU. On one hand, we are talking about a country at war; it is absolutely absurd for a country at war to be admitted to the European Union.
text_zh: 彼得·马扎尔谈乌克兰：我们不支持乌克兰加速加入欧盟。一方面，我们谈论的是一个处于战争状态的国家；让一个处于战争状态的国家加入欧盟是绝对荒谬的。

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Israeli drone activity detected over the Jnah Neighborhood of Beirut. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 在贝鲁特真纳（Jnah）社区上空探测到以色列无人机活动。 @wfwitness

text: Péter Magyar on Russian oil: Russia stays here, Hungary stays here. We will do everything for diversification, but this does not mean that we will decouple. We will always get oil as cheaply and safely as possible.
text_zh: 彼得·马扎尔谈俄罗斯石油：俄罗斯留在这里，匈牙利留在这里。我们将尽一切努力实现多元化，但这并不意味着我们将脱钩。我们将始终尽可能廉价且安全地获取石油。

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 The official X account for Israel posted a humorous image insinuating that Hezbollah was standing in the way of peace negotiations with Lebanon. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 以色列官方 X 账号发布了一张幽默图片，暗示真主党阻碍了与黎巴嫩的和平谈判。 @wfwitness

text: Ukraine carried out a long-range drone strike on the Apatit (PhosAgro) chemical plant in Cherepovets, deep inside Russia (about 800–1,000 km from Ukraine). The plant is a major fertilizer and chemical producer, with some materials considered potentially dual-use.
text_zh: 乌克兰对俄罗斯境内的切列波韦茨（Cherepovets）的 Apatit (PhosAgro) 化工厂进行了远程无人机袭击，该地深入俄罗斯腹地（距离乌克兰约800-1000公里）。该工厂是主要的化肥和化学品生产商，其中一些材料被认为具有潜在的两用性。

text: 🇮🇷 🇻🇦 Iranian President Pazeshkian in a message to Pope Leo XIV: I condemn the insult to Your Excellency on behalf of the great nation of Iran, and declare that the desecration of Jesus, the prophet of peace and brotherhood, is not acceptable to any free person. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 🇻🇦 伊朗总统佩泽希齐扬在致教皇利奥十四世的信息中表示：我代表伟大的伊朗民族谴责对阁下的侮辱，并声明亵渎耶稣这位和平与兄弟情谊的先知，是任何自由人都无法接受的。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 A woman in her sixties was lightly wounded when a Hezbollah rocket struck the northern city of Nahariya. She was injured by the blast and glass shards. The Israeli military said fewer than ten rockets were launched from Lebanon; most were intercepted, but one hit near a residential building. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 一名六旬妇女在真主党火箭弹击中北部城市纳哈里亚（Nahariya）时受轻伤。她被爆炸和玻璃碎片所伤。以色列军方称，从黎巴嫩发射的火箭弹不到十枚；大多数被拦截，但有一枚击中了一栋住宅楼附近。 @wfwitness

text: 🇮🇱 🇮🇹 "We strongly condemn the manipulative use of the recent cover of L'Espresso." - Israeli Ambassador to Italy ℹ️ The magazine literally used a real photo for their cover. Nothing was manipulated. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇱 🇮🇹 “我们强烈谴责对《L'Espresso》杂志近期封面的操纵性使用。” - 以色列驻意大利大使 ℹ️ 该杂志封面确实使用了真实照片。没有任何东西被操纵。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Two Hezbollah fighters of Armenian origin have been killed in fighting in southern Lebanon. Adam Khrikhor Hachmian, a Christian who converted to Shia Islam, adopted the name Adam and was buried according to Shia customs. Manuel Babakian, a senior field commander from the group’s “founders’ generation” known as “Mano the Armenian”, was also killed. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 两名亚美尼亚裔真主党战士在黎巴嫩南部的战斗中丧生。亚当·克里科尔·哈奇米安（Adam Khrikhor Hachmian）是一名皈依什叶派伊斯兰教的基督徒，他采用了亚当这个名字，并按照什叶派习俗下葬。该组织“创始人一代”的高级战地指挥官曼努埃尔·巴巴基安（Manuel Babakian，被称为“亚美尼亚人马诺”）也被击毙。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇧🇭 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Bahrain’s Crown Prince Salman bin Hamad Al Khalifa, who is also deputy supreme commander of the armed forces and prime minister, met with U.S. Central Command chief Admiral Brad Cooper to discuss strengthening strategic partnership in military and defence fields. The Crown Prince highlighted the historic role of bilateral ties in deterring Iranian attacks. The two also reviewed regional developments. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇧🇭 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 巴林王储兼武装部队副最高统帅、首相萨勒曼·本·哈马德·阿勒哈利法会见了美国中央司令部司令布拉德·库珀海军上将，讨论加强军事和国防领域的战略伙伴关系。王储强调了双边关系在威慑伊朗袭击方面的历史作用。双方还回顾了地区局势的发展。 @wfwitness

text: Iran Threatens Gulf Ports as U.S. Imposes Naval Blockade Iran’s Khatam al-Anbiya Central HQ Spokesperson Ebrahim Zolfaghari said no port in the Gulf will be safe if Iranian ports were threatened, after U.S. military announced a blockade of Iranian ports starting Monday. READ MORE
text_zh: 伊朗威胁海湾港口，美国实施海军封锁。伊朗哈塔姆·安比亚中央总部发言人易卜拉欣·佐尔法加里（Ebrahim Zolfaghari）表示，如果伊朗港口受到威胁，海湾地区没有一个港口是安全的。此前美国军方宣布从周一开始封锁伊朗港口。阅读更多

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 NPR : A senior Hezbollah field commander, using the nom de guerre Jihad, stated that the group has adopted a new decentralised command structure under leader Naim Qassem. Fighters are divided into semi‑autonomous units that do not communicate with each other to avoid Israeli surveillance. “One specialises in shooting, another watches the road. Another might even specialise in wrapping sandwiches for the fighters,” he said. Following the 2024 pager attacks, Hezbollah no longer imports electronics and uses old Motorola devices, handwritten notes and couriers on motorbikes. The commander admitted mistakes led to the killing of Hassan Nasrallah. He claimed Hezbollah did not disarm but gave the Lebanese army empty boxes and old items. Smuggling weapons through Syria remains possible despite Assad’s fall, and the group manufactures some weapons domestically using internet tutorials. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 NPR：一名使用代号“圣战”（Jihad）的真主党高级战地指挥官表示，该组织在领导人纳伊姆·卡西姆（Naim Qassem）的领导下采用了新的去中心化指挥结构。战士们被分成半自治的单位，彼此之间不进行通信，以避免以色列的监视。“一个专门负责射击，另一个负责观察道路。另一个甚至可能专门负责为战士包装三明治，”他说。在2024年寻呼机袭击事件后，真主党不再进口电子产品，而是使用旧的摩托罗拉设备、手写笔记和摩托车信使。该指挥官承认错误导致了哈桑·纳斯鲁拉的死亡。他声称真主党没有解除武装，而是给了黎巴嫩军队空箱子和旧物品。尽管阿萨德倒台，通过叙利亚走私武器仍然可能，而且该组织利用互联网教程在内部制造一些武器。 @wfwitness

text: 🇭🇺 Péter Magyar calls for Hungary's President to resign saying that he didn't say a word when thousands of Hungarian children were abused by pedophiles 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇭🇺 彼得·马扎尔呼吁匈牙利总统辞职，称当成千上万的匈牙利儿童被恋童癖者虐待时，他一言不发。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 The governor of Tehran Mohammad-Sadegh Motamedian said U.S. and Israeli attacks constitute war crimes, with 40,000 residential homes damaged in the province. Emergency services, schools and even UNESCO‑listed historical sites have been hit. He added that there is international silence in the face of such crimes, and that Iran will document and pursue the crimes through international bodies. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 德黑兰省省长穆罕默德-萨德格·莫塔梅迪安（Mohammad-Sadegh Motamedian）表示，美国和以色列的袭击构成了战争罪，该省有40,000处住宅受损。紧急服务设施、学校甚至联合国教科文组织列出的历史遗迹都遭到了袭击。他补充说，面对此类罪行，国际社会保持沉默，伊朗将记录这些罪行并通过国际机构进行追究。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 Al-Akhbar: Israeli forces have destroyed the ancient fortress and shrine of Simon al-Safa in the town of Shama, southern Lebanon, using ground bulldozers and airstrikes. The site, located about 5 kilometers from the Israeli border, is traditionally associated with St. Peter. Israeli Army Radio reports that it was the scene of a clash about a year and a half ago in which Israeli researcher Zeev Erlich and Golani soldier Gur Kehati were killed. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 Al-Akhbar：以色列军队使用地面推土机和空袭摧毁了黎巴嫩南部沙马（Shama）镇的西蒙·阿勒-萨法（Simon al-Safa）古堡和圣殿。该遗址距离以色列边境约5公里，传统上与圣彼得有关。以色列陆军电台报道称，这里是一年半前发生冲突的地点，当时以色列研究员泽夫·埃利希（Zeev Erlich）和戈拉尼旅士兵古尔·凯哈蒂（Gur Kehati）在冲突中丧生。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇭🇺🇷🇺Kremlin spokesman Peskov said that Russia respects the results of the Hungarian election. "Hungary has made its choice. We respect this choice. We expect to continue our very pragmatic contacts with the new leadership of Hungary. We heard the statement…" ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇷🇺 Kremlin spokesman Peskov reports that the offer to hold enriched Iranian uranium is still in effect but hasn't been requested. Reporter: "Can I ask a second question about Iran? Russia's offer to accept Iranian enriched uranium. Is it still in force?" Peskov: "This offer was voiced by President Putin in contacts with the United States and regional states. This offer is still in force, but it was not requested." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇭🇺🇷🇺克里姆林宫发言人佩斯科夫表示，俄罗斯尊重匈牙利选举的结果。‘匈牙利做出了选择。我们尊重这一选择。我们期待继续与匈牙利新领导层进行非常务实的接触。我们听到了声明……’” ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇷🇺 克里姆林宫发言人佩斯科夫报告称，持有伊朗浓缩铀的提议仍然有效，但尚未被要求。记者：“我可以问第二个关于伊朗的问题吗？俄罗斯接受伊朗浓缩铀的提议。它仍然有效吗？” 佩斯科夫：“这一提议是普京总统在与美国和地区国家接触时提出的。这一提议仍然有效，但并未被要求。” @wfwitness

text: 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu: “We are not talking about 5 positions in southern Lebanon, but a security belt to eliminate the threat of a Hezbollah ( ground) invasion and push back the missile threat”
text_zh: 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 以色列总理本雅明·内塔尼亚胡：“我们谈论的不是黎巴嫩南部的5个阵地，而是建立一个安全带，以消除真主党（地面）入侵的威胁，并击退导弹威胁。”

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡🇮🇱 Red alert sirens are sounding in Nahariya, and the surrounding areas of the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness" ⚡ 🇮🇱 Red alert sirens are sounding in Kiryat Shmona, and the surrounding areas of the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡🇮🇱 纳哈里亚及以色列北部对抗线地区周边地区响起红色警报。 @wfwitness” ⚡ 🇮🇱 基里亚特什莫纳（Kiryat Shmona）及以色列北部对抗线地区周边地区响起红色警报。 @wfwitness

text: 🇺🇸 The USS George H.W. Bush (CVN-77) has crossed the Strait of Gibraltar. It is now the third U.S. aircraft carrier entering the Iran theater. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 美国乔治·H·W·布什号航空母舰（CVN-77）已穿过直布罗陀海峡。它现在是第三艘进入伊朗战区的美国航空母舰。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ✌️ 🇮🇶 Hamas leadership council head Muhammad Darwish congratulated Iraqi President Nizar Muhammad Sa'id al-Amidi on his election, wishing him success. He affirmed that al-Amidi's election represents an important step toward strengthening stability and national unity in Iraq, reflecting the great confidence he enjoys. Darwish emphasized Hamas's pride in the fraternal relations and historical solidarity between the Palestinian and Iraqi peoples, stressing the importance of continued Iraqi support for the Palestinian cause to achieve freedom, independence, and return.
text_zh: ✌️ 🇮🇶 哈马斯领导委员会主席穆罕默德·达尔维什（Muhammad Darwish）祝贺伊拉克总统尼扎尔·穆罕默德·赛义德·阿米迪（Nizar Muhammad Sa'id al-Amidi）当选，并祝愿他取得成功。他申明，阿米迪的当选是加强伊拉克稳定和民族团结的重要一步，反映了他所享有的巨大信任。达尔维什强调，哈马斯为巴勒斯坦和伊拉克人民之间的兄弟关系和历史团结感到自豪，并强调伊拉克继续支持巴勒斯坦事业以实现自由、独立和回归的重要性。

text: 🇭🇺 💬 🇷🇺 🇨🇳 Péter Magyar: The Kremlin has spoken, and Beijing has spoken. I thank them for their respectful acceptance of the decision of the Hungarian electorate, the Hungarian people, and they are also open to pragmatic cooperation, just as Hungary is, because geography is geography. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇭🇺 💬 🇷🇺 🇨🇳 彼得·马扎尔：克里姆林宫已经表态，北京也已经表态。我感谢他们对匈牙利选民、匈牙利人民决定的尊重，他们也像匈牙利一样对务实合作持开放态度，因为地理就是地理。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Péter Magyar: The Kremlin has spoken, and Beijing has spoken. I thank them for their respectful acceptance of the decision of the Hungarian electorate, the Hungarian people, and they are also open to pragmatic cooperation, just as Hungary is, because geography is geography.
text_zh: 彼得·马扎尔：克里姆林宫已经表态，北京也已经表态。我感谢他们对匈牙利选民、匈牙利人民决定的尊重，他们也像匈牙利一样对务实合作持开放态度，因为地理就是地理。

text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "🇭🇺 "Viktor Orbán played such a five-dimensional chess game, and this was probably one of the reasons for his defeat, among others. He talked about everything: Ukraine, Russia, Iran, the Iranian Shah, the Iranian Ayatollah, the US presidential election. …" 🇭🇺 "We will refrain from interfering in the domestic affairs of any other country. We ask the same of all countries for Hungary." - Peter Magyar 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 DD Geopolitics：“🇭🇺 ‘维克多·欧尔班玩了一场五维国际象棋，这可能是他失败的原因之一。他谈论了一切：乌克兰、俄罗斯、伊朗、伊朗沙阿、伊朗大阿亚图拉、美国总统大选。……’” 🇭🇺 “我们将避免干涉任何其他国家的内政。我们也要求所有国家对匈牙利这样做。” - 彼得·马扎尔 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇭🇺 "Viktor Orbán played such a five-dimensional chess game, and this was probably one of the reasons for his defeat, among others. He talked about everything: Ukraine, Russia, Iran, the Iranian Shah, the Iranian Ayatollah, the US presidential election. Probably, if he had been woken from his sleep, he would have said that he won the US presidential election, not Donald Trump. Viktor Orbán talked about everything except for the problems affecting the Hungarian people." - Peter Magyar 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇭🇺 “维克多·欧尔班玩了一场五维国际象棋，这可能是他失败的原因之一。他谈论了一切：乌克兰、俄罗斯、伊朗、伊朗沙阿、伊朗大阿亚图拉、美国总统大选。可能如果他从睡梦中被叫醒，他会说他赢得了美国总统大选，而不是唐纳德·特朗普。维克多·欧尔班谈论了一切，除了影响匈牙利人民的问题。” - 彼得·马扎尔 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Péter Magyar: Viktor Orbán played such a five-dimensional chess game, and this was probably one of the reasons for his defeat, among others. He talked about everything: Ukraine, Russia, Iran, the Iranian Shah, the Iranian Ayatollah, the US presidential election. Probably, if he had been woken from his sleep, he would have said that he won the US presidential election, not Donald Trump. Viktor Orbán talked about everything except for the problems affecting the Hungarian people.
text_zh: 彼得·马扎尔：维克多·欧尔班玩了一场五维国际象棋，这可能是他失败的原因之一。他谈论了一切：乌克兰、俄罗斯、伊朗、伊朗沙阿、伊朗大阿亚图拉、美国总统大选。可能如果他从睡梦中被叫醒，他会说他赢得了美国总统大选，而不是唐纳德·特朗普。维克多·欧尔班谈论了一切，除了影响匈牙利人民的问题。

text: Péter Magyar: We will refrain from interfering in the domestic affairs of any other country. We ask the same of all countries for Hungary.
text_zh: 彼得·马扎尔：我们将避免干涉任何其他国家的内政。我们也要求所有国家对匈牙利这样做。
